channel.title: 番剧每日新闻RSS
channel.description: 自动聚合：新番、定档、PV、STAFF、CAST、延期资讯 | Auto-updated anime news aggregator

item.title: [动画][续作] Anime News Network Monogatari Off & Monster 季度 Anime的 新作 Episode Debuts Winter
item.description: New episode is titled "Wazamonogatari: Karen Ogre" ― Aniplex revealed a new visual and the winter 2026 broadcast for the upcoming "Wazamonogatari: Karen Ogre" episode of the MONOGATARI Series: OFF &... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Monogatari Off & Monster Season Anime's New Episode Debuts in Winter

item.title: [动画][发表] Anime News Network AI 动画 Company Puri Prince 宣布 Dennō Isu Tantei Charlotte ~Dead Man的 Hand~ Short 动画
item.description: Hina Yomiya, Tomokazu Sugita, more star in anime based on noriyang's web novel Dennō Isu Tantei Charlotte ― Tokyo-based AI animation company Puri Prince announced on Thursday the second installment... | 来源: ANN | 原文: AI Animation Company Puri Prince Announces Dennō Isu Tantei Charlotte ~Dead Man's Hand~ Short Anime

item.title: [动画][CAST][公开] Anime News Network Mebius Dust 动画 公开 5 More 声优阵容 Members
item.description: Kanon Amane, Kensho Uesugi, Shōta Hayama, Kō Bonkobara, Genta Nakamura join cast of July 9 series ― The official website for Mebius Dust, Dōga Kōbō's original television anime based on Hajime... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Mebius Dust Anime Reveals 5 More Cast Members

item.title: [动画][STAFF][公开] Anime News Network Yoshitaka Amano的 ZAN 动画 Project 公开 制作阵容 Mecha 动画 Veterans
item.description: Masashi Ikeda, Tōru Yoshida direct anime with Ryōsuke Takahashi overseeing series scripts ― ZAN, artist Yoshitaka Amano's anime project based on his DEVA ZAN art, announced its staff on Thursday. The... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Yoshitaka Amano's ZAN Anime Project Reveals Staff of Mecha Anime Veterans

item.title: [动画][CAST][公开] Anime News Network Black Torch TV 动画 公开 Same-Day English Dub, 声优阵容
item.description: AJ Beckles, Ben Balmaceda, Ben Diskin, Erin Yvette, more star in English dub on Saturday ― Crunchyroll announced on Wednesday that it will stream a same-day English dub for the television anime of... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Black Torch TV Anime Reveals Same-Day English Dub, Cast

item.title: [动画][剧场版] MyAnimeList Short Story Rusuban Gets Short 动画 Movie August 2026
item.description: Animation studio Rock'n Roll Mountain announced a short anime movie adaptation of Akiko Okuda's Rusuban (Babysitting) short manga story on Thursday, revealing the cast, staff, a visual (pictured),... | 来源: MAL | 原文: Short Story 'Rusuban' Gets Short Anime Movie for August 2026

item.title: [动画] MyAnimeList Yoshitaka Amano的 Original 动画 Zan Production
item.description: Yoshitaka Amano's newest company, Yoshitaka Amano Inc., announced on Thursday that the previously announced Zan anime project is in production and revealed the main staff. The pilot will be shown at... | 来源: MAL | 原文: Yoshitaka Amano's Original Anime 'Zan' in Production

item.title: [CAST] MyAnimeList 追加 声优阵容 Mebius Dust Announced
item.description: The official website for the Mebius Dust television anime announced additional cast on Thursday. The anime series is scheduled to premiere on Tokyo MX at 11.30 p.m. followed by BS Fuji and MBS on... | 来源: MAL | 原文: Additional Cast for 'Mebius Dust' Announced

item.title: [续作] MyAnimeList Marriagetoxin Gets 第二 季度 Winter 2027
item.description: The 13th and final episode of Marriagetoxin ended with an announcement on Tuesday that a second season is in production. The official website also revealed an announcement promo. The second season is... | 来源: MAL | 原文: 'Marriagetoxin' Gets Second Season in Winter 2027

item.title: [PV][STAFF][公开] MyAnimeList Blade & Bastard 公开 Main 制作阵容, 第二 预告 宣传视频
item.description: The official X for the Blade & Bastard anime revealed the main staff and a second teaser promotional video on Tuesday. The anime is scheduled to premiere in 2027. Staff Director: Tomoki Kobayashi... | 来源: MAL | 原文: 'Blade & Bastard' Reveals Main Staff, Second Teaser Promo

item.title: [CAST] MyAnimeList Summer 2026 Simulcast List
item.description: In this thread, you'll find a comprehensive list of television anime acquired for simulcast release during the Summer 2026 season. Anime series licensed for home video release can be found here. This... | 来源: MAL | 原文: Summer 2026 Simulcast List

The 10-episode anime series is scheduled to premiere worldwide... | 来源: MAL | 原文: 'Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2' Unveils Additional Staff, Second Teaser Promo [Update 6/30]
